scripts.check-skills: diff -q skills/next-frontend-architecture/assets/hooks/use-app-dispatch.ts src/modules/shared/hooks/use-app-dispatch.ts && diff -q skills/next-frontend-architecture/assets/hooks/use-app-selector.ts src/modules/shared/hooks/use-app-selector.ts && diff -q skills/next-frontend-architecture/assets/store/store.ts src/modules/shared/store/store.ts && diff -q skills/next-frontend-architecture/assets/types/svg.d.ts src/types/svg.d.ts
